channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GLP-1s have transformed weight loss and diabetes. Is addiction next?
item.description: A large study found that people taking GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic for diabetes were less likely to be diagnosed with substance use disorder.

item.title: How to Choose the Best Health Plan
Strategies for Smarter Health Spending
item.description: Learn how to choose the right plan and navigate health insurance with confidence at every stage of life.

item.title: Why the 'mad scramble' to fill hormone therapy prescriptions for menopause
item.description: With the removal of FDA warning labels, hormone therapy to treat symptoms of menopause has grown in popularity. Now some patients are reporting delays...

item.title: Under financial strain, primary care doctors unite
item.description: Under increasing financial stress, primary care practices across the U.S. are banding together in larger groups to negotiate more lucrative insurance ...

item.title: What to Do When Your Claim Is Denied
Women Who Struggle With This Are At An Increased Risk For High Blood Pressure
item.description: One more reason to catch those zzz's.

item.title: This Vitamin Majorly Reduces Dementia Risk (Per Research On 69,643 People)
item.description: Here are the easiest ways to ensure sufficient levels.

item.title: I've Been A Cosmetic Dermatologist For 24+ Years: 3 Tips To Smooth Cellulite
item.description: You can have cellulite no matter what products you use on your skin, how old you are, or how much you weigh.

item.title: This Supplement May Support Brain Activity In Those With Depression
item.description: As much progress as we've made talking about mental health, treatments can still be hit or miss.

item.title: Anxious All the Time? Your Daily Drink Habit Deserves a Second Look
item.description: We had plenty of reasons to cut back on soda. Science just added one more.

item.title: Menopause hormone therapy is popular, so why the 'mad scramble' to fill prescriptions?
item.description: With the removal of the black-box warning on hormone therapy for menopause, some providers and patients report shortages or delays, waiting for a phar...

item.title: Why young girls are disguised as boys in Afghanistan
item.description: The Taliban has released a video of an interrogation of a girl who passed as a boy. It's an age-old practice in this patriarchal society but now appea...
